panels.description: Real-time resource utilization across all RabbitMQ instances. Color transitions smoothly from cool blue (idle) → green (normal) → amber (elevated) → red (critical).

targets.expr: (100 * sum({__name__=~"rabbitmq_queue_accumulation|rabbitmq_queue_messages_ready",instanceId=~"$InstanceGaugeIDs"}) by (instanceId) / 1000000) or on(instanceId) (0 * group(cloud_monitor_instance_info{service="amqp", regionId=~"$region", costcenter=~"$CostCenter", appcode=~"$AppCode", instanceId=~"$InstanceGaugeIDs"}) by (instanceId))

panels.title: ⚡ Instance Utilization

panels.description: Percentage of instances in SERVING state for the selected region.

targets.expr: 100 * sum(cloud_monitor_instance_info{service="amqp", regionId=~"$region", status="SERVING", costcenter=~"$CostCenter", appcode=~"$AppCode"}) / clamp_min(sum(cloud_monitor_instance_info{service="amqp", regionId=~"$region", costcenter=~"$CostCenter", appcode=~"$AppCode"}), 1)

panels.title: Instance Health Score

panels.description: Estimated monthly infrastructure cost based on active instance count.
panels.title: Estimated Monthly Cost

panels.description: Estimated cost per one million published messages in the last 30 days.
panels.title: Cost per 1M Messages

panels.description: Queue backlog usage against a logical 1M message threshold.
panels.title: Queue Capacity Usage

panels.description: Monthly infrastructure allocation grouped by Alibaba Cloud tags.

targets.expr: sum(cloud_monitor_instance_info{service="amqp", regionId=~"$region", status="SERVING", costcenter=~"$CostCenter", appcode=~"$AppCode"}) by (costcenter, appcode)
sum(cloud_monitor_instance_info{service="amqp", regionId=~"$region", status="SERVING", costcenter=~"$CostCenter", appcode=~"$AppCode"}) by (costcenter, appcode) * 360

panels.title: Cost Allocation by Cost Center and App Code
